stemHtml: Comparing a parabolic reflector with a flat plate antenna of the same size…

options.a: the parabolic reflector generates less side lobes than the flat plate antenna.
options.b: the flat plate antenna has a considerably smaller beam width.
options.c: the parabolic reflector has a considerably smaller beam width.
options.d: the flat plate antenna generates less side lobes than the parabolic reflector.
